expected_behavior: The valid repair record fixture parses through @krn/contracts while preserving benchmark_no_lift classification and proposed status.
failure_mode: Benchmark no-lift repair evidence can no longer be represented as a typed proposed repair record.

expected_behavior: The known-bad fixture that claims validated repair without a passed validator fails deterministically.
failure_mode: KRN accepts a repair record that claims validation without validator evidence.

expected_behavior: A benchmark no-lift report fixture generates a parseable proposed repair record under .krn/repairs with classification benchmark_no_lift and productivity-lift claims blocked.
failure_mode: No-lift benchmark evidence cannot produce a typed repair handoff without overclaiming.
